name: India
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 7-8 FOR 20TH JOINT COMMISSION — FIRST IRANIAN-FM VISIT TO INDIA SINCE AUG 2024; 75TH ANNIVERSARY INDIA-IRAN FRIENDSHIP TREATY; CO-CHAIRS WITH JAISHANKAR + CALLS ON PRESIDENT MURMU.** Diplomatic timing IS the signal: Araghchi moves directly from Pakistan-mediated track into high-tier engagement with India during the same 48-hour window MOU is meant to be finalized. Positions India as parallel diplomatic node — not the mediator (Pakistan), but a regional power Iran wants to brief in person while a deal is on the table. PM Modi's May 5 Fujairah condemnation (without naming Iran — strategic-autonomy hedge) elevates to in-person Iranian-FM engagement within 48 hours. Watch for Indian-MEA framing of Hormuz freedom-of-navigation in joint readouts; any Chabahar mentions; any signal on India-Iran rupee-settlement oil track restart. **Markets — material macro relief contingent on MOU signature:** Brent collapsed -7% May 6 to ~$103, trading $101.95 May 7 morning; USD/INR ₹94.74 (-0.5% 1D) pulled back further from ₹95.36 record on Brent collapse + DXY weakness; India 10Y G-Sec ~6.99% (-3-5bps); India VIX -6.88% on the week. Nifty 24,360.45 (+0.12% early May 7); Sensex 77,949.38 (-0.01%); Gift Nifty +0.67% pre-open. **FII flow stress visible:** sustained outflow ₹3,621.6 cr May 5; week net ₹13,771 cr selling vs DII ₹11,585 cr buying = absorption ratio 84% (lower than prior weeks' ~90% — domestic absorption capacity being tested). Indian equity gap with global risk-on widens slightly — S&P/KOSPI/MSCI EM rallied; Nifty +0.12% remains within underperformance band. **The deployment-relevant question:** if MOU signs within 7-10 days, with crude $101 + USD/INR ₹95 + CAD pressure easing, structural argument for India re-rates favorably; question is timing of FPI return. Eight-million-strong Indian Gulf diaspora exposure factor remains active — UAE airspace closure through May 11; 3 Indian nationals injured in Fujairah strike receiving medical care.

current.delta_1d: Nifty +0.12%; Sensex -0.01%; USD/INR -0.5%; 10Y -3-5 bps; India VIX -6.88% on week
current.deployment_context: Indian equities still UNDERPERFORM crisis-relief regime but USD/INR pulled back further to ₹94.74 on Brent collapse + DXY weakness. FII outflow May 5 ₹3,621 cr; week net ₹13,771 cr selling vs DII ₹11,585 cr buying = DII absorption 84% (down from ~90% — capacity being tested). If MOU signs and FPI rotation reverses, India re-rates favorably. AI flows continue to bypass India IT services (Apple-Samsung-Intel halo to Korea/Taiwan/US).

active_triggers.condition: Rupee crosses ₹95/USD — DEACTIVATED on ceasefire. Current ₹92.55. WATCHING.
India announces fuel-price pass-through OR Iran-rupee oil track restart via Chabahar within 30 days (by 2026-05-27)
